====Pokémon competitions====
[[File:Iris Wings.png|thumb|250px|The prize for winning the Club Battle]]
Iris has competed in the following {{cat|Pokémon competitions}}:
* [[Club Battle]] - Winner (''[[BW042|Club Battle Finale: A Hero's Outcome!]]'')
* [[Eindoak Harvest Festival|Harvest Festival Battle Competition]] - Disqualified (''[[M14|Pokémon the Movie: White—Victini and Zekrom, Black—Victini and Reshiram]]'')
* [[Pokémon Performance Competition]] - N/A (''[[BW053|A Maractus Musical!]]'')
* [[Wishing Bell Festival]] - 4th (''[[BW069|Climbing the Tower of Success!]]'')
* [[Clubsplosion]] - Top 8 (''[[BW072|A Clubsplosion of Excitement!]]'')
* [[Pokémon World Tournament Junior Cup]] - Top 4 (''[[BW092|Ash, Iris, and Trip: Then There Were Three!]]'')
* [[Marine Cup Tournament]] - Top 16 (''[[BW125|Cilan and the Case of the Purrloin Witness!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Sumo Tournament]] - Top 16 (''[[BW134|The Journalist from Another Region!]]'')
{{-}}
